10.4 - Submission of the Notice of Admission (NOA) 
(Rev. 11447, Issued: 06-06-22, Effective: 01-01-22, Implementation: 05-26-22) 

Beginning January 1, 2022, HHAs will no longer submit Requests for Anticipated 
Payment (RAPs). Instead, for each admission to home health, the HHA notifies Medicare 
systems via submission of an NOA. The NOA is a one-time submission to establish that 
the beneficiary is under a home health period of care and trigger home health
